issues.title: Unlabeled button on candidate database page
issues.detail: The database page has one unlabeled button. For a daily operator relying on efficient navigation, this button's purpose is unclear, potentially causing confusion or extra clicks.

### P3

| **I5** | Unlabeled button on database page — One button on the database page lacks an accessible label, which may hinder screen reader users and reduce trust in accessibility compliance. | p3-admin | `j1-deep-link-p1-evaluator-s1` |
